channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter - drink bottles & cans etc, 23rd July
item.description:
This area at the side of St Nichs is a hot spot for drinks containers to be left on top of the utility box and on the ground. This practice has been reported many times before. Has the retailer been asked to help stop this practice or to take responsibility for cleaning up the mess?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 23rd July
item.description:
Dumped car VW black golf no number plates no vin number been here ages time to remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Willow Way, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 23rd July
item.description:
Dumped car no number plates no vin number time to remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped wardrobe at melbourne grove/Lytcott grove junction, 23rd July
item.description:
Fly tipped large white wardrobe outside small urban orchard at junction of Melbourne Grove and Lytcott Grove SE22

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chatsworth Way SE27 outside property number 1, 23rd July
item.description:
Chatsworth Way SE27 outside property number 1 a number of road holes. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your team for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Chatsworth Way, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Voi bike abandoned, 23rd July
item.description:
There’s an abandoned Voi bike on Widmore Road between the junctions with Freelands Road and Homefield Road. The bike was previous in Freelands Road for several weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wren Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Column damaged, 23rd July
item.description:
Column H70 44 Was hit months ago. It’s still not been replaced. These columns are ugly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped trash on kerb, 23rd July
item.description:
Household waste and hackney street cleaning waste bags dumped on street kerb

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside 29/31, 23rd July
item.description:
Street light outside 29/31 is out
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway 62, 23rd July
item.description:
More rubbish dumped again down Alleyway 62. This is on pathway and grassed area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Leigh Place, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 23rd July
item.description:
The usual corner used for flytipping sadly. Mattresses this time. Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 23rd July
item.description:
This street light is out again. It goes out once a month for 3 or 4 days causing total darkness. Why is it going out? Why is the problem not being addressed? Pretty sure our council tax pays for street lighting so get the thing fixed once and for all.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Insane amounts of littler Muir Road, Clapton, 23rd July
item.description:
I was genuinely shocked by the sheer amount of litter filling the gutters, across the pavements, roads and in hedges all across Clapton. Please do something, it’s clearly not been cleaned in weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallets and building rubble in a shopping trolley opposite and on the corner of Kirkwood and Crewys Road, 23rd July
item.description:
Dumped pallets and building rubble in a shopping trolley opposite and on the corner of Kirkwood and Crewys Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkwood Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much litter on Kingsland & Stoke Newington Road, 23rd July
item.description:
A daily occurrence. Just as I’ve walked the length of the road to get home I noticed 3 people throwing more on top of the piles, showing that they only encourage more litter! Something has to be done, this borough has become a dumping ground.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Persistent fly tipping. Every week there's something else. It's a hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped table with organisations identifiers, 23rd July
item.description:
Fly tipped table with identifying tags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nichol Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water meter cover missing, 23rd July
item.description:
Water meter cover outside number 17 Hazeldene Road missing, leaving a large hole that a child or elderly person can fall in.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazeldene Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with expired MOT and door hanging off., 23rd July
item.description:
This car has been parked on the road outside 26/28 Swingate Lane for about 2 weeks now. Its MOT has expired so is parked illegally, and as you can see from the picture, the door is hanging off, so it is clearly unroadworthy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
